title: Eliakeim #1662
definition:
Eliakim = "raising up by God"

 1) the eldest son of Abiud or Judah, bother of Joseph,
    and father of Azor \\#Mt 1:13\\
 2) son of Melea, and father of Jonan \\#Lu 3:30,31\\
